overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulation game showing nighttime driving in heavy rain on a multi-lane highway, transitioning into a well-lit tunnel. The view shows the Audi dashboard and steering wheel as windshield wipers clear the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway bridge during heavy rainfall

events.description: vehicle approaches and enters tunnel portal, transitioning from outdoor rain to indoor shelter

agents.ego_description: driving on rainy highway with active windshield wipers, maintaining lane position while approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: white truck driving ahead in same lane with brake lights visible

entered.detail: metal guardrail with red reflective markers running parallel to the road
metal guardrail with red reflective markers on the right side
tall overhead street lights illuminating the highway at regular intervals
large overhead highway sign structure spanning across all lanes
concrete tunnel entrance with dark opening becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway during a heavy downpour at night, with windshield wipers actively clearing rain. Metal guardrails line both sides of the road while street lights illuminate the path ahead. A white truck is visible driving in the same lane ahead, and a concrete tunnel entrance gradually approaches in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated highway tunnel with overhead lane control signals

events.description: lighting shifts from dim street lights to bright continuous tunnel illumination as rain stops hitting windshield
passing under overhead lane control signals showing green arrows and red X marks

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel, passing under traffic control signals mounted on the ceiling

entered.detail: concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction lines and blue reflective strips
concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction lines
continuous row of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel length
overhead traffic signals displaying green arrows and red X marks for lane control

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a well-lit concrete tunnel, leaving the rain behind. The enclosed space features smooth concrete walls with reflective strips and continuous overhead lighting. Lane control signals with green arrows and red X marks are mounted on the tunnel ceiling, indicating lane availability as the vehicle continues driving through the straight tunnel passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a rain-slicked nighttime highway into the sterile environment of a brightly lit tunnel. It begins amidst a heavy downpour, with windshield wipers actively clearing the glass while street lights reflect off the wet pavement and metal guardrails. As the car follows a white truck ahead, the open road gradually narrows toward a concrete tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts abruptly from the storm into an enclosed space of smooth concrete walls and continuous overhead lighting, leaving the rain behind. Finally, the camera glides through the straight passage beneath lane control signals displaying green arrows and red X marks.
